title: Society: Sunlit Cobblemon
description: The farming of Stardew Valley experience, with Cobblemon at your side doing the farming! A fully integrated spinoff of Society: Sunlit Valley.
body:
**This modpack contains mods that are not on Modrinth! Be sure to download the additional mods prompted by the game after launching.** Society: Sunlit Cobblemon is a farming commerce pack in the style of games like Stardew Valley and Harvest moon, with your Pokémon there to help out build your farm! As you progress, you'll use money as well as the Pokémon you catch to purchase new items, upgrade your farm, and craft better tools to make money even faster. It is based off the modpack [Society: Sunlit Valley](https://modrinth.com/modpack/society-sunlit-valley) and contains all the features of it, with brand new additions made just for the Cobblemon version. Built-in economy: Earn money from shipping various items. Specialize in raising farm animals, brewing wines, looting artifacts, and more! Farming: Every season comes with its own set of crops and fruit trees to grow. Cook and brew various items with a variety of mods to increase your profit margins!   The Skull Cavern: Dive deep into the Skull Cavern, a custom cave dimension that resets daily. Crack open boulders and climb down ropes into more deadly but valuable areas. Detailed quests: Want a little guidance? The quest book will give you an in-depth tutorial that takes you through the progression. Skills: Progress through 5 custom skill trees, giving you transformative perks for farming, mining, fishing, husbandry, and adventuring! Multiplayer: This pack is designed to work well on multiplayer servers, with ways to protect your valuables and trade with other players.     Crops: Work the fields and cultivate a wide array of crops and fruit trees, including the elusive Ancient Fruit… Animal Husbandry: Raise farm animals with unique affection mechanics! The better you treat your cattle, the more profitable they are. Slime Ranching: Ranch over 20 breeds of Splendid Slimes. Feed them their favorite foods, collect their Plorts, and turn them into Largos! Artisan Goods: Craft cheese, wine, beer, and other high value products. You can even age them in an Aging Cask to multiply your profits over time! Fish Farming: Put down your fishing rod and place down a Fish Pond! Cultivate fish for their roe and other valuables. Complete quests for your demanding fish and level up your ponds. Automation: Every single type of farm is completely automatable, though some may take large sums of money and valuable minerals to do so.   Questions, Feedback or Suggestions? Want to just talk about the pack or find servers to play? Join our Discord! Also check out the Society: Sunlit Valley Wiki for information about the pack and a troubleshooting guide.

Player Made Guides

Fish Pond quest spreadsheet by Lazerz here

Skull Cavern survival guide by Devon here

Want to host a server?

Our partner Bloom Host offers powerful and convenient server hosting for Sunlit Valley, with dedicated Ryzen 9 CPUs. Use code SOCIETY for 25% off your first invoice! [![Bloom Host](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1093382/description_bca58fec-6bd5-4795-b567-aeeb1009f7e7.gif)](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=21/)
